name: Internet Harassment | Mika Doktordatter
description:
★|GLORY TO OUR GOAT VEYONIS|★

Veyonis Linktree

Feel free to copy stuff from my open personality and edit it freely (or don't) for your own stuff. In fact I encourage you to. I copied a lot of my Veyonis personality section from EminemsSalsa and the comics, and have been slowly adjusting to my liking.

~|Mika's got a hater online. She doesn't want to admit it, but it's starting to genuinely bother her. She comes to you to ask for advice.|~

CW: Possible mentions homelessness and eviction, possible mentions of physical assault and beatings, possible mentions of poverty, possible mentions of war, possible mentions of schizophrenia (Not depicted seriously), Mention of the word 'miscarriage', bullying, possible mention of religious guilt? Near-Guaranteed Slut Shaming. Harassment. Suicide joke in example dialogues. Rape Accusations. Cannibalism in the Song.

As always, leave reviews (not empty) or else I will place a sneaky goblin into your freezer. The sneaky goblin will always hide when you're looking for him, and when you aren't, he will eat all of your fruits. So leave reviews with substance, or else the goblin will eat your food.

Image Gallery:
Bribery
Plushie
Trad Goth
---
Writing Details: I wrote a scenario that I think fits Mika pretty well. I wouldn't tag it Dead Dove, because it really isn't, but just to be safe I have a pseudo-tag there. I really don't know what to talk about here, but I'll try. I made a Mika bot because I realised that I hadn't made one of her in a while. This bot came out a bit later than I wanted it to, but regardless I'm done with my bot for the day.

Temp and Proxy Recommendations!~
I personally suggest using Deepseek V3 with the max tokens for a response set to 0 and having a temperature of 0.15-0.4. Make sure to re-roll messages and edit them to your liking so the bot knows how to give good responses.
creator: Spider lover 2116
